articles.title: Scientists warn Australia’s “zombie tree” could vanish within a generation
articles.description: A newly identified Australian tree has been dubbed the “zombie” tree because it’s alive but unable to reproduce. articles.title: Microplastics may be quietly damaging your brain and fueling Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s
articles.description: Tiny plastic particles may be quietly threatening brain health.
